label: SC-7(22)
title: Separate Subnets for Connecting to Different Security Domains

prose.en: Implement separate network addresses to connect to systems in different security domains.

guidance.en: The decomposition of systems into subnetworks (i.e., subnets) helps to provide the appropriate level of protection for network connections to different security domains that contain information with different security categories or classification levels.

prose.en: separate network addresses are implemented to connect to systems in different security domains.

objects.en: system configuration settings and associated documentation
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
organizational personnel with boundary protection responsibilities
Mechanisms supporting and/or implementing separate network addresses/different subnets
